description: Size of a single scenario which spans all stages
Number of groups of related random data within each sub-scenario; meaningful only if all sub-scenarios have the same size
Size of the sub-scenario associated with each stage; if not provided all sub-scenarios have size ScenarioSize/TimeHorizon
The scenarios; i-th row contains the i-th scenario where Scenarios[i][j] is the j-th component of the i-th scenario
Size of each group of related random data in each sub-scenario; required only if NumberRandomDataGroups > 1
